final:
module shift_register (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input load,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        data_out <= 4'b0000; // Reset the register
    end else if (load) begin
        data_out <= data_in; // Load new data
    end else begin
        data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[3:1]}; // Shift right
    end
end

endmodule
